inputs.label: Number of Shares
inputs.businessContext: The total number of shares purchased in the stock.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total number of shares purchased in the stock.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hisse senedinde satın alınan toplam hisse sayısı.

inputs.label: Purchase Price per Share
inputs.businessContext: The price at which each share was bought.

businessContext_i18n.en: The price at which each share was bought.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her bir hissenin satın alındığı fiyat.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Preis, zu dem jede Aktie gekauft wurde.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix auquel chaque action a été achetée.

inputs.label: Selling Price per Share
inputs.businessContext: The price at which each share was sold.

businessContext_i18n.en: The price at which each share was sold.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Preis, zu dem jede Aktie verkauft wurde.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix auquel chaque action a été vendue.

inputs.label: Total Dividends Received
inputs.businessContext: Sum of all dividends paid per share over the holding period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Sum of all dividends paid per share over the holding period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Elde tutma süresi boyunca hisse başına ödenen tüm temettülerin toplamı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Summe aller Dividenden pro Aktie über den Haltedauerzeitraum.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Somme de tous les dividendes versés par action sur la période de détention.

inputs.label: Holding Period
inputs.businessContext: The length of time the stock was held, in years.

businessContext_i18n.en: The length of time the stock was held, in years.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hisse senedinin elde tutulduğu süre (yıl cinsinden).
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Dauer, für die die Aktie gehalten wurde, in Jahren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée de détention de l'action, en années.
